summary: Base W9 — first post-deload step-up week. WEEKLY TEMPLATE PERMANENTLY CHANGED 6/16 (Adj #92): Hyp A moved Wed→Tue, threshold moved Tue→Wed, Thu now permanently off. Lift and quality run stay on separate days, so the lift/run decoupling holds; tradeoffs accepted = running 5→4 days/wk (~17 mpw) and (in Build+) quality compresses to 48h Wed→Fri — keep Mon/Sat-long easy and watch the reactive tendons (Adj #63/#64). This week: Tue 6/16 = Hyp A (incline 145 repeat miss-#1, preacher BUMP 65); Wed 6/17 = threshold 4×8 @ T ~7:50–7:55/mi (Adj #77); Thu off; Fri 40 min easy + strides; Sat long 60 + Hyp B (calf 335 bump released, Adj #40/#89). Hill-stride debut landed clean Mon (Adj #44/#91).
